Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The objective is to transform multiple ERP tables Orders Order Lines Delivery Invoice Payments plus optional Products and Resources into a single comprehensive event log suitable for process mining The event log must have at least Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor and optionally other attributes Each row represents one event ordered chronologically per case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Cases The prompt explicitly states to use order_id as the case identifier So cases will be 1001 1002 1003 1004 1005

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Derive Activities and Map Timestamps I need to go through each table and extract events for each order_id Orders Table Order Created event Timestamp order_date Resource sales_person_id Attributes customer_id customer_type order_priority

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Order Lines Table Item Picked events The prompt says produce one event per activity if it is meaningful or summarize if appropriate Since there are multiple items per order with different picking times and pickers I will create one event per line item Item Picked to preserve detail

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Delivery Table Order Dispatched and Order Arrived events Each delivery record has two timestamps I will split them into two events Order Dispatched timestamp delivery_dispatch_date resource carrier_id and Order Arrived timestamp delivery_arrival_date resource carrier_id Attributes delivery_id carrier_id delivery_note

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Payments Table Payment Received event Timestamp payment_date Resource payment_method or maybe leave as system payment processor but prompt says Resource Actor is optional I will use payment_method as resource for now or just map it logically

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Note on Order 1004 It appears in Orders and Order Lines but has no Delivery Invoice or Payment records I will still include its events Order Created Item Picked I will note missing data

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Combine and Enrich Data I need to join the tables on order_id invoice_id and map resource IDs to names using the Resources table Map sales_person_id to resource_name Map picker_id to resource_name Map carrier_id to resource_name Map billing_person_id to resource_name

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets list out all events chronologically per order_id

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1001 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1002 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received Payment Received

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1003 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1004 Order Created Item Picked No delivery invoice or payment records

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1005 Order Created Item Picked Item Picked Order Dispatched Order Arrived Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure the Output Table Columns Case ID Event ID optional but helpful Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor Attributes Details I will sort by Case ID first then Timestamp

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait check chronological order for 1002 Actually 1000 is before 1015 So Arrived 2 should come before Invoice 1 Lets fix the order for 1002

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Yes this is strictly chronological

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I will add a brief Assumptions and Methodology section before the table to satisfy the prompt instruction If data is missing or ambiguous document any assumptions made

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review and Format Check columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor Attributes Check case IDs 1001 to 1005 covered Check chronological order per case Verified Check resource mapping Used names and IDs

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Assumptions to note Multiple picking events per order are kept separate for granularity Delivery dispatch and arrival are split into two distinct activities Payment resource is mapped to payment method system since no specific person ID is provided Order 1004 lacks downstream data so its lifecycle ends at picking

Name: Validation - PE
Text: All steps verified Output matches requirements
